feed.title: Quarq power meters
feed.subtitle: Quarq DZero + DUB (Ship-In-A-Bottle) and older Quarq devices.

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.4.2
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.4.2

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Improves recovery from an error state caused by impacts where the power meter reports zero power while reporting non-zero cadence. The error recovery improves the power meter interface to Flight Attendant systems.

Released: 2024-10-10

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.2.8
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.2.8

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Bug Fix - resolved setup calibration issue causing the power meter to become unresponsive until the battery is removed and reinstalled.

Released: 2022-08-30

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.1.17
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.1.17

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Fix for a small percentage of devices that use too much battery in sleep.

Released: 2022-08-25

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.3.3
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.3.3

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Platform updates, future product support, and battery indication corrections.

Released: 2022-08-10

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.1.16
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.1.16

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Improve power accuracy in certain rare edge cases.

Released: 2021-10-05

entry.title: QUARQ DUB POWER METER (PM-ASSY-D1) — firmware 1.1.12
entry.summary:
QUARQ DUB POWER METER PM-ASSY-D1 — firmware 1.1.12

Part: SHIP IN A BOTTLE

Various bug fixes and performance improvements.

Released: 2021-04-15

entry.title: QUARQ POWER METER (PM-DZ-A1) — firmware 10
entry.summary:
QUARQ POWER METER PM-DZ-A1 — firmware 10

Part: QUARQ DZERO

Magic Zero auto-calibration, bux fixes

Released: 2019-07-01

entry.title: QUARQ POWER METER (PM-DZ-A1) — firmware 7

entry.title: QUARQ POWER METER (PM-DZ-A1) — firmware 6
entry.summary:
QUARQ POWER METER PM-DZ-A1 — firmware 6

Part: QUARQ DZERO

Bug fix to improve battery life

Released: 2018-03-30
